suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update loop-memory-worker skill procedure to explicitly include webhook-level regression coverage when memory/lifecycle fixes affect async run terminalization and status-path contracts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature wave6-browser-only-canonical-url-hardening required updates to integrations/browser-use-discovery/tests/webhook/run-discovery.test.ts and integrations/browser-use-discovery/tests/webhook/handle-discovery-webhook.test.ts to satisfy VAL-LOOP-CROSS-006, but the loop-memory-worker skill currently only names state/browser/planner test focus.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify worker test write-scope guidance to permit contract-focused webhook test edits for memory/lifecycle fixes when these are necessary to verify async lineage and terminalization behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md loop-memory-worker scope lists memory tests, while accepted feature fix and validation evidence required webhook test changes for contract-safe lifecycle assertions.
